# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "vmCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 2,
      "minValue": 1,
      "maxValue": 50
    },
    "vmNamePrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "devvm"
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString"
    },
    "osType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Windows",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Windows",
        "Linux"
      ]
    },
    "windowsImageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2019-Datacenter",
      "allowedValues": [
        "2016-Datacenter",
        "2019-Datacenter",
        "2022-Datacenter",
        "Windows-11"
      ]
    },
    "linuxImageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "22_04-lts",
      "allowedValues": [
        "20_04-lts",
        "22_04-lts",
        "24_04-lts"
      ]
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_B2s"
    },
    "addressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.10.0.0/16"
    },
    "subnetPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.10.1.0/24"
    },
    "rdpSourceCidr": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "*"
    },
    "sshSourceCidr": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "*"
    },
    "publicIpSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard",
        "Basic"
      ]
    },
    "publicIpAllocationMethod": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Static",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Static",
        "Dynamic"
      ]
    },
    "osDiskType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Premium_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Premium_LRS",
        "StandardSSD_LRS",
        "Standard_LRS"
      ]
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "vnetName": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-vnet')]",
    "subnetName": "default",
    "nsgName": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-nsg')]",
    "linuxPublisher": "Canonical",
    "linuxOffer": "0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy",
    "windowsPublisher": "MicrosoftWindowsServer",
    "windowsOffer": "WindowsServer",
    "windows11Publisher": "MicrosoftWindowsDesktop",
    "windows11Offer": "windows-11"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[variables('vnetName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "[parameters('addressPrefix')]"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('subnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('subnetPrefix')]",
              "networkSecurityGroup": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[variables('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 1000,
              "access": "Allow",
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[parameters('rdpSourceCidr')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 1010,
              "access": "Allow",
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[parameters('sshSourceCidr')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-pip-', copyIndex())]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('publicIpSku')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "publicIPAllocationMethod": "[parameters('publicIpAllocationMethod')]"
      },
      "copy": {
        "name": "publicIpCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-nic-', copyIndex())]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic",
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
              },
              "publicIPAddress": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-pip-', copyIndex()))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]",
        "publicIpCopy"
      ],
      "copy": {
        "name": "nicCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2024-03-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex())]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex())]",
          "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          "adminPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]",
          "linuxConfiguration": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), json(concat('{\"disablePasswordAuthentication\":false}')), json('null'))]"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), if(equals(parameters('windowsImageSku'), 'Windows-11'), json(concat('{\"publisher\":\"', variables('windows11Publisher'), '\",\"offer\":\"', variables('windows11Offer'), '\",\"sku\":\"win11-23h2-pro\",\"version\":\"latest\"}')), json(concat('{\"publisher\":\"', variables('windowsPublisher'), '\",\"offer\":\"', variables('windowsOffer'), '\",\"sku\":\"', parameters('windowsImageSku'), '\",\"version\":\"latest\"}'))), json(concat('{\"publisher\":\"', variables('linuxPublisher'), '\",\"offer\":\"', variables('linuxOffer'), '\",\"sku\":\"', parameters('linuxImageSku'), '\",\"version\":\"latest\"}')))]",
          "osDisk": {
            "createOption": "FromImage",
            "managedDisk": {
              "storageAccountType": "[parameters('osDiskType')]"
            }
          }
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-nic-', copyIndex()))]"
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "nicCopy"
      ],
      "copy": {
        "name": "vmCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "publicIpAddresses": {
      "type": "array",
      "value": "[array(range(0, parameters('vmCount'))).map(i => reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-pip-', i)), '2023-11-01').ipAddress)]"
    },
    "vmNames": {
      "type": "array",
      "value": "[array(range(0, parameters('vmCount'))).map(i => concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-', i))]"
    }
  }
}
